mapper.sql: PDP.ID, PDP.TRUST_ID, PDP.TRUST_CARGO_ID, PDP.BUSINESS_NO, PDP.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, PDP.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, PDP.SHIPVOYAGE_NAME, PDP.SCN, PDP.CARGO_OWNER_ID, PDP.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, PDP.CARGO_CODE, PDP.CARGO_NAME, PDP.PORT_CODE, PDP.PORT_NAME, PDP.PACKING_CODE, PDP.PACKING_NAME, PDP.TRADE_TYPE, PDP.PLAN_TON, PDP.STATUS, PDP.SEG_PLAN_TON1, PDP.SEG_PLAN_TON2, PDP.SEG_PLAN_TON3, PDP.SEG_PLAN_TON4, PDP.MASS_NAMES_TARGET, PDP.MASS_NAMES_TARGET_LABEL, PDP.PLAN_DATE, PDP.CREATE_BY, PDP.CREATE_BY_NAME, PDP.CREATE_TIME, PDP.UPDATE_BY, PDP.UPDATE_BY_NAME, PDP.UPDATE_TIME, PDP.EXAMINE_BY, PDP.EXAMINE_BY_NAME, PDP.EXAMINE_TIME, PDP.NOTICE_TYPE, PDP.BEGIN_TIME, PDP.END_TIME, PDP.PLAN_TYPE, PDP.ClASS_CODE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_DIS_PORT_DAYNIGHTPLAN(ID, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, BUSINESS_NO, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_NAME, SCN, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, PORT_CODE, PORT_NAME, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PLAN_TON, STATUS, SEG_PLAN_TON1, SEG_PLAN_TON2, SEG_PLAN_TON3, SEG_PLAN_TON4, MASS_NAMES_TARGET, MASS_NAMES_TARGET_LABEL, PLAN_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, NOTICE_TYPE, BEGIN_TIME, END_TIME, PLAN_TYPE, CLASS_CODE ) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trustCargoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{businessNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoOwnerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoOwnerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{portCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{portName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packingCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packingName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planTon, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{segPlanTon1, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{segPlanTon2, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{segPlanTon3, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{segPlanTon4, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{massNamesTarget, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{massNamesTargetLabel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{noticeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{beginTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{endTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{planType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE T_DIS_PORT_DAYNIGHTPLAN SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXAMINE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, EXAMINE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXAMINE_TIME = #{now}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} WHERE ID = #{id}

UPDATE T_DIS_PORT_DAYNIGHTPLAN SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXAMINE_BY = NULL, EXAMINE_BY_NAME = NULL, EXAMINE_TIME = NULL, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM T_DIS_PORT_DAYNIGHTPLAN PDP WHERE TO_CHAR(PLAN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = #{planDate} AND STATUS = '20' ORDER BY CREATE_TIME DESC,ID
SELECT PARAM_VAL FROM SYS_PARAMETER WHERE PARAM_CD = 'DAY_NIGHT_PLAN_SWITCH'
SELECT sum( WEIGHT_GOODS ) FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE IS_DELETE = 0 AND IS_FINISHED = 1 AND PLAN_NO = #{businessNo}
select TON FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO WHERE BUSINESS_NO = #{businessNo}
SELECT PARAM_VAL FROM SYS_PARAMETER WHERE PARAM_CD = 'FORECAST_WEIGHT'
SELECT count(DAY_NIGHT_PLAN_ID) FROM T_BUS_PLAN_ENTRUST WHERE DAY_NIGHT_PLAN_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT sum( WEIGHT_GOODS ) FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE IS_DELETE = 0 AND IS_FINISHED = 1 AND PLAN_NO = #{businessNo} AND WEIGH_IN_DT>= #{startDate} AND WEIGH_IN_DT <=#{endDate}
SELECT C.ROLE_CODE FROM SYS_ROLE_USER B INNER JOIN SYS_ROLE C ON B.ROLE_ID = C.ID WHERE B.USER_ID = #{id}

SELECT
FROM T_DIS_PORT_DAYNIGHTPLAN PDP
TO_CHAR(PLAN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = #{planDate} AND PDP.PACKING_CODE = '1'
SELECT sum( WEIGHT_GOODS ) FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE IS_DELETE = 0 AND IS_FINISHED = 1 AND PLAN_NO = #{businessNo} AND WEIGH_IN_DT <= #{beginTime}
SELECT NVL(SUM(WEIGHT_GOODS), 0) FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE IS_DELETE = 0 AND IS_FINISHED = 1 AND PLAN_NO = #{businessNo}
SELECT sum( WEIGHT_GOODS ) FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE IS_DELETE = 0 AND IS_FINISHED = 1 AND PLAN_NO = #{businessNo}
